meta.description: Synthetic winter storm scenario: Gulf of Finland low-pressure system making landfall

initial.last_summary: Storm watch: low pressure system approaching from the west

ticks.observation: Low pressure deepening offshore; coastal wind gusts reaching 15 m/s, light snowfall beginning
Storm front reaching northern coast; heavy snowfall, visibility below 200 m on highway E75
Power lines down in Greater Helsinki area; hospital backup generators activated, tram network suspended
Severe blizzard conditions in Oulu; major road closures, electricity grid under critical stress
Storm peak passing Helsinki; conditions still hazardous but wind speed decreasing, repair crews mobilised
Recovery phase in Oulu: grid restoration ongoing, main roads reopening, hospital capacity stabilising
